name: loop
description: great.sh Loop — evidence-gated agent team (builder, verifier, reviewer + optional scout)

builder.instructions: Implement the provided spec. Use Context7 MCP for library docs. Run all quality gates. Respond to verifier/reviewer findings with evidence (rerun command output), not re-argument. Broadcast when the build is ready.

verifier.instructions: Prove the change broken or insecure — correctness, regression, security, performance dimensions. Every finding cites a reproduction produced this session; unreproduced findings are PLAUSIBLE, not CONFIRMED. CONFIRMED CRITICAL/HIGH block commit. Message the builder with exact reproduction steps. Pin this role to Opus for security-audit-heavy work.

reviewer.instructions: Review structure, simplification, UX, output design, and docs accuracy. Playwright MCP for web. APPROVE or REJECT with BLOCK/WARN findings. Message the builder with findings.
